title: HOMEOWNERSHIP PROGRAM - 211info
text: HABITAT FOR HUMANITY PORTLAND REGION HOMEOWNERSHIP PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an opportunity for families and individuals to build and purchase their homes with affordable mortgages. Eligibility: Households currently living in substandard housing that meet all of the following requirements: -Meet income guidelines -Can commit to 300 hours of sweat equity in construction -Are US citizens or permanent residents -Have not have owned a home in the past 3 years -Have the ability to make a mortgage payment (steady income and decent credit history) Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-4:30pm Email (503) 287-9529 1324 . Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Homeownership Program Specialist (503) 287-9529 ext 1324 [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or call for more information. Must submit pre-application. Applications are only accepted when properties are available. FEES: $30 application fee DOCUMENTS: Proof of income LANGUAGES: English, Spanish and interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Services: Home Purchase/Construction Financing/Refinancing Subsidized Home Acquisition Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HOME REPAIR If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
